text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preiß zu haben seyen : <BIBL><AUTHOR>Janii</AUTHOR> & <AUTHOR>Tremellii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR>. & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Titus Livius</AUTHOR> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Fixed encoding artifacts (mojibake): 'B\\u221a\\u00bacher' to 'Bücher', 'Prei\\u221a\\u00fc' to 'Preiß', '4t\\u221a\\u2264' to '4to', and '8v\\u221a\\u2264' to '8vo'. 2. Added a missing closing </BIBL> tag after the 'Mohemii' entry. 3. Restructured the 'Janii & Tremellii' entry to correctly tag the names as <AUTHOR> instead of including them in the <TITLE>. 4. Changed 'Titus Livius' from <TITLE> to <AUTHOR> for consistency with other entries."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preiß zu haben seyen : <BIBL><AUTHOR>Janii</AUTHOR> & <AUTHOR>Tremellii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR>. & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Titus Livius</AUTHOR> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed encoding artifacts (mojibake): 'B\u221a\u00bacher' to 'Bücher', 'Prei\u221a\u00fc' to 'Preiß', '4t\u221a\u2264' to '4to', and '8v\u221a\u2264' to '8vo'. 2. Added a missing closing </BIBL> tag after the 'Mohemii' entry. 3. Restructured the 'Janii & Tremellii' entry to correctly tag the names as <AUTHOR> instead of including them in the <TITLE>. 4. Changed 'Titus Livius' from <TITLE> to <AUTHOR> for consistency with other entries.
